THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED, THAT: 1. PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AT TRIAL, ALL FUNDS CURRENTLY HELD IN ESCROW NO. 15123156-339-LDK WILL BE RELEASED TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ACKNOWLEDGES NO CLAIM TO SAID FUNDS. 2. PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AS DAMAGES FOR THE BREACH OF CONTRACT THE SUM OF $2,000.00 AND SHALL RECOVER ITS COSTS AS PROVIDED BY LAW. 3. PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK ATTORNEY'S FEES BY WAY OF A NOTICED MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
